files.style.css: * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } body { font-family: system-ui; background: linear-gradient(145deg, #0a0c12 0%, #0f1117 100%); min-height: 100vh; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .container { background: rgba(18, 22, 32, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-radius: 2rem; padding: 2rem; width: 90%; max-width: 800px; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } h1 { color: white; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; } canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 300px; background: #0f172a; border-radius: 1rem; margin: 1rem 0; } button { background: #3b82f6; border: none; color: white; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 2rem; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; transition: 0.2s; } button:hover { background: #2563eb; transform: scale(0.98); } .status { color: #94a3b8; text-align: center; margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.85rem; }
files.utils.js: export const generateRandomBars = (count = 50) => { return Array.from({ length: count }, () => Math.random() * 100); };
